config.scxml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<scxml xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/07/scxml" xmlns:editor="http://vscxml.com/editor" version="1.0" datamodel="ecmascript" initial="operational" name="HamiltonSTAR_CoRe96Head">
  <datamodel>
    <data id="tips_fitted" expr="false"/>
    <data id="tip_type" expr="-1"/>
    <data id="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
    <data id="pos_x" expr="0"/>
    <data id="pos_y" expr="0"/>
    <data id="pos_z" expr="0"/>
    <data id="last_error" expr="0"/>
  </datamodel>
  <state id="operational" initial="not_initialized" editor:x="12" editor:y="12" editor:width="1847" editor:height="575" editor:label="operational" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="0">
    <state id="not_initialized" editor:x="30" editor:y="106" editor:width="225" editor:height="75" editor:label="not_initialized" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="1">
      <transition target="no_tips" event="C0EI" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6A3N8E2QDNN4RTKX86">
        <assign location="tips_fitted" expr="false"/>
        <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
        <assign location="pos_x" expr="_event.data.xs || 0"/>
        <assign location="pos_y" expr="_event.data.yh || 0"/>
        <log expr="'Init 96 Head'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="idle" initial="no_tips" editor:x="413" editor:y="92" editor:width="1091" editor:height="368" editor:label="idle" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="2">
      <transition target="moving" event="C0EM" editor:waypoints="1556,296;1556,517" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6AYV42KQG90TG3WH3H">
        <assign location="pos_x" expr="_event.data.xs || pos_x"/>
        <assign location="pos_y" expr="_event.data.yh || pos_y"/>
        <assign location="pos_z" expr="_event.data.za || pos_z"/>
        <log expr="'96 Head move'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="idle" event="C0EV" editor:waypoints="1534,165;1534,470;383,470;383,274" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6A4M2V2ZTPPFM1GGYA">
        <assign location="pos_z" expr="0"/>
        <log expr="'96 Head Z-safe'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <state id="no_tips" editor:x="911" editor:y="45" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="no_tips" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="3">
        <transition target="tips_empty" event="C0EP" editor:waypoints="1208,187;1208,184;455,184;455,412;973,412;973,387" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6AB1JGR6Q5T2JMPEJ0">
          <assign location="tips_fitted" expr="true"/>
          <assign location="tip_type" expr="_event.data.tt"/>
          <log expr="'96 Tip pickup type=' + _event.data.tt" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="error" event="C0EA" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6AB3JQKCNKAR7KCFVE">
          <assign location="last_error" expr="8"/>
        </transition>
      </state>
      <state id="tips_on" initial="tips_empty" editor:x="50" editor:y="127" editor:width="718" editor:height="211" editor:label="tips_on" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="4">
        <transition target="no_tips" event="C0ER" editor:waypoints="1208,276;1208,205" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6A0EE7BV6SFJS76BDQ">
          <assign location="tips_fitted" expr="false"/>
          <assign location="tip_type" expr="-1"/>
          <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
          <log expr="'96 Tip eject'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="washing96" event="C0EG" editor:waypoints="1639,286;1639,507" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6AMPBPYMN32BE09VQX">
          <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
          <log expr="'96 Head wash'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <state id="tips_empty" editor:x="513" editor:y="96" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="tips_empty" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="5">
          <onentry>
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
          </onentry>
          <transition target="tips_loaded" event="C0EA" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6AM1QM3HEF4R8547FY">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="_event.data.af"/>
            <log expr="'96 Aspirate vol=' + _event.data.af" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
        </state>
        <state id="tips_loaded" editor:x="100" editor:y="91" editor:width="200" editor:height="75" editor:label="tips_loaded" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="6">
          <transition target="tips_loaded" event="C0ED" cond="_event.data.da == 2 || _event.data.da == 3" editor:waypoints="166.66666666666666,81;233.33333333333331,81" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6AV8ENGPS438ZJKYZ0">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="Math.max(0, volume_held_01ul - _event.data.df)"/>
            <log expr="'96 Dispense partial vol=' + _event.data.df" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="tips_empty" event="C0ED" editor:waypoints="953,347;953,357" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6AQZR59HJ42SCT14M4">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="Math.max(0, volume_held_01ul - _event.data.df)"/>
            <log expr="'96 Dispense jet vol=' + _event.data.df" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
        </state>
      </state>
    </state>
    <state id="moving" editor:x="79" editor:y="455" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="moving" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="7">
      <transition target="idle" event="move96.done" editor:waypoints="256,492;256,266" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6AE0G0RGAHGP82968A"/>
    </state>
    <state id="washing96" editor:x="1642" editor:y="470" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="washing96" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="8">
      <transition target="tips_empty" event="wash96.done" editor:waypoints="385,532;385,276;973,276;973,342" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6A64NPGFCGGM36H1GK"/>
    </state>
    <state id="error" editor:x="1662" editor:y="125" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="error" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="9">
      <onentry>
        <log expr="'96Head error ' + last_error" label="ERROR"/>
      </onentry>
      <transition target="not_initialized" event="C0EI" editor:waypoints="1546,162;1546,78;395,78;395,143" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PNK6APEP988AR07Z03SZV">
        <assign location="last_error" expr="0"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
  </state>
</scxml>
